heading_content_part: All-In-One Calculator - Privacy PolicyLoading...Skip to ContentMenuHomeAll-In-One CalculatorPrivacy PolicyTLDR; We're not after your data.Let's be real. This is a calculator. The only data it reports is from the analytics and crash reporting libraries needed to develop the app further and fix eventual crashes. This data is not personally identifiable. Also there are ads here and there.

However if you choose to sign in, your settings and calculator history will be stored in a database on the cloud. We only store the data tied to an account id. We don't store your name and email. That data remains locally on your device.
